ATL.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron due to trades. Limited flexibility for further roster changes.

BOS.note: Tatum returns healthy. Core is expensive and locked in. Limited flexibility, but young players need to step up.

BKN.note: Significant cap space (>$30M). Positioned to be major buyers in free agency.

CHA.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron. Limited flexibility for further roster changes.

CHI.note: Significant cap space (>$30M). High draft pick Caleb Wilson. Positioned to be buyers.

CLE.note: Projected over 2nd apron. Harden's contract decision is key for cap flexibility.

DET.note: Young core with flexibility. Duren's RFA decision is key. Movable mid-tier contracts.

IND.note: Haliburton returns healthy. Near 1st apron, limiting flexibility. Willing to spend.

MIA.note: Giannis acquired. Adebayo/Herro core. Jovic's contract a potential trade challenge.

NYK.note: Over 1st apron. Owner reluctant to exceed 2nd apron. Limited trade flexibility.

ORL.note: Over 1st apron, near 2nd apron. Limited trade flexibility. Expensive young core.

WAS.note: #1 pick AJ Dybantsa. Rebuilding with young talent. High cap flexibility.

DAL.note: Anthony Davis in Dallas. Near 2nd apron, limiting flexibility. Need to shed salary.

DEN.note: Over 1st apron, close to 2nd. Jokic/Murray/Gordon are maxed. Cam Johnson/Valanciunas are trade chips.

GSW.note: Over cap, under 1st apron. Moody injured. Butler addition. Limited flexibility.

HOU.note: Over second apron, limiting flexibility. Young core. Durant's age/injury a concern. Finney-Smith a trade chip.

LAC.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron. Kawhi/Garland core. Flexibility through options/trades. Beal injury.

LAL.note: Doncic era. Hard-capped at 1st apron. Flexibility depends on LeBron/options. No tradeable first-round picks.

MEM.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron, but significant cap room. High draft pick Cameron Boozer.

MIN.note: Over 1st apron. Edwards is a star. Gobert/Randle are trade pieces. DiVincenzo injured.

OKC.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron. Known for draft capital. Limited trade flexibility.

PHX.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron. Limited flexibility for roster changes.

POR.note: Above cap, below 1st apron. Young core. Lillard returns from Achilles. Trade-focused for upgrades.

SAC.note: Over 1st apron, near 2nd apron. Limited flexibility. DeRozan a trade candidate.

SAS.note: Deep young core on cheap deals. Wembanyama. High cap flexibility. Quaintance injured.

UTA.note: Cap space, draft capital, young talent (Peterson). Flexibility for retooling.
